name: SCADA Consultants
description: The most comprehensive directory of GICSP- and CAP-credentialed SCADA consultants, OT cybersecurity specialists, and industrial control systems integrators in the United States.
certifications: GICSP (Global Industrial Cyber Security Professional — GIAC)
cityPagePromptContext:
SCADA consultants design, implement, and secure Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition systems for utilities, manufacturing plants, oil & gas facilities, and water/wastewater treatment operations.
Credentialed professionals (GICSP, CAP, ISA/IEC 62443) perform system architecture design, PLC/HMI programming, network segmentation, cybersecurity risk assessments, and NERC CIP compliance reviews. Plant engineers and utility operators hire them during control system modernization projects, after cybersecurity incidents, or when seeking independent OT security audits. Deliverables include architecture diagrams, vulnerability assessments, remediation roadmaps, and hands-on implementation support.
buyerSearchContext: when upgrading legacy control systems, after a cybersecurity incident or audit finding, during a plant expansion, or when seeking ICS/OT compliance assessment

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help plant engineers and utilities find credentialed SCADA consultants without wading through vendors who mostly want to sell proprietary hardware — a conflict of interest he ran into when evaluating control system upgrades for an industrial facility.

schema.label: GICSP Certified
schema.scrape_hint: Look for GICSP credential logos, GIAC certification numbers, or explicit 'GICSP' mentions on the about page, team bios, or certifications section.

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', team bios, or '20+ years in industrial automation' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Professional Certifications
schema.scrape_hint: Scan credentials section, team profiles, or certification logos for GIAC, ISA, ISACA, or PE license markers; match exact acronyms and full certification names.

schema.label: OT/ICS Cybersecurity Specialist
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'OT security', 'ICS cybersecurity', 'NERC CIP compliance', 'industrial network segmentation', or ISA/IEC 62443 assessments in services or methodology pages.

schema.label: Vendor-Independent
schema.scrape_hint: Look for statements like 'vendor-agnostic', 'platform-independent', 'we do not resell hardware', or absence of exclusive OEM partnerships in offerings or partnerships pages.

schema.label: Industries Served
schema.scrape_hint: Parse industry pages, case studies, or 'Markets We Serve' sections; match keywords like 'upstream/downstream', 'municipal water', 'power generation', 'discrete manufacturing', or 'chemical processing'.

schema.label: Engagement Types
schema.scrape_hint: Parse services menu, homepage offerings, or capability pages; match keywords like 'system architecture', 'vulnerability assessment', 'DCS migration', 'compliance audit', or 'PLC programming'.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
